base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of samus_suitless_shooting_variants — a character (playable) from 1986 metroid. Shooting idle/walk/jump/aim-up — suitless variants. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
